subcodes.first_line: The heaven of divine bounty is upraised, the Sun of utterance hath dawned, the effulgences of His countenance are manifest, the verses have been sent down and the evidences made clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آسمان عنایت رحمن مرتفع آفتاب بیان مشرق و انوار وجه ظاهر آیات نازل و بینات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
